channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ashton Jeanty confirms departure from Boise State after this season
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Boise State running back and Heisman Trophy candidate Ashton Jeanty confirmed Thursday that this will be his last season at the university.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Luis Severino and Athletics agree to $67 million, 3-year contract, AP sources say
item.description: Right-hander Luis Severino and the Athletics have agreed to a $67 million, three-year contract, two people familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The people spoke on condition of anonymity Thursday because the agreement had not yet been announced by the team.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks fire coach Luke Richardson in his 3rd season after league-worst start
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Blackhawks fired coach Luke Richardson on Thursday, signaling their frustration with the state of the franchise's rebuilding project. Chicago has dropped four in a row to fall to an NHL-worst 8-16-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tottenham joins list of top Premier League teams to lose at Bournemouth as fans jeer Postecoglou
item.description: Manchester City, Arsenal, and now Tottenham. The list of top Premier League teams beaten at Bournemouth this season is growing. Dean Huijsen took advantage of Tottenham’s weakness at set pieces to head home a 17th-minute winner in Bournemouth’s 1-0 victory on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac takes dig at 'Hawk Tuah Girl' Haliey Welch amid memecoin controversy
item.description: As "Hawk Tuah Girl' Haliey Welch deals with controversy over her new memecoin, golf influencer Paige Spiranac said she's learned a big lesson about not entering the crypto space.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler has new putting grip and trails Cameron Young by 3 in Bahamas
item.description: NASSAU, Bahamas (AP) — Scottie Scheffler brought a new putting grip to the Hero World Challenge and felt enough improvement to be satisfied with the result, a 5-under 67 that left him three shots behind Cameron Young on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Total number of Texas fans caught and punished for throwing bottles in Georgia game: Zero
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — The University of Texas investigation into the bottle-throwing incident that disrupted the Texas-Georgia game in October — and drew a harsh rebuke and fine from the Southeastern Conference — resulted in no one being caught or punished.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The A's clear the last major hurdle for a $1.75 billion Las Vegas stadium
item.description: The Las Vegas Stadium Authority approved the lease, non-relocation and development documents Thursday to clear the last major hurdles for the Athletics to construct a stadium on the Strip and bring Major League Baseball to the expanding sports market.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Aaron Rodgers says it 'ridiculous' to believe he has more to prove, still hopes to return to Jets next year
item.description: While Aaron Rodgers remains interested in a future with the Jets, it is unclear if the franchise has mutual feelings about the relationship continuing in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bill Belichick, Marcus Freeman among favorites to be the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, oddsmakers say
item.description: Former New England Patriots head coach Bill Belichick and current Chicago Bears interim head coach Thomas Brown are among the early favorites to be the Bears' next head coach, according to sports gambling outlets.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: ROSEMONT, Ill. (AP) — The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Spinning and winning: How Texans’ Danielle Hunter uses cerebral approach, track background to perfect Euro step move
item.description: Texans Pro Bowl defensive end has made a big impact this season and is an NFL Defensive Player of the Year candidate
item.dc:creator: Aaron Wilson, KPRC 2

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus after skid marked by poor decisions late in games
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss at Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Oakland youth football team raises funds for national championship trip
item.description: (KRON) -- One of the Bay Area's top youth football programs has qualified for the 2024 Pop Warner Championship. However, the East Bay Warriors 13U team will need the community's support to help get them there.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
